question_text: What is the main purpose of adding an iron core to an electromagnet?

options.label: A
options.text: To increase the strength of the magnetic field

options.label: B
options.text: To make the wire thicker and stronger

options.label: C
options.text: To reduce the amount of current needed

options.label: D
options.text: To change the direction of the magnetic field

explanation: An iron core becomes magnetised when current flows through the coil around it, which greatly strengthens the overall magnetic field produced. Without the iron core, the electromagnet would be much weaker.
